uplink.description: fPort 10 status: leak detected, remote-probe alarm clear (TTN example 'Alarm and 29 Degree')
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (leak=1->water.leak true; remote=0->remoteAlarm 0; battery=100->batteryPercent; temperature=0*255+29=29->water.temperature.current).

uplink.description: fPort 10 status: no leak, remote-probe alarm clear (TTN example 'Valve Closed')
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (leak=0->water.leak false; temperature=0*255+29=29).

uplink.description: fPort 10 status: leak detected, remote-probe alarm set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (byte0=3 sets bit0 leak + bit1 remote-probe alarm; temperature=1*255+5=260 confirms the verbatim bytes[2]*0xff+bytes[3] formula).

uplink.description: fPort 16 heartbeat: battery + temperature, no leak channel
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (fPort 16 carries no leak/remote; battery=90->batteryPercent; temperature=0*255+22=22).

uplink.description: unknown fPort is rejected (TTN example 'Unknown FPort')
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input; reference/upstream-codec.js returns {errors:['unknown FPort']} for any fPort other than 10 or 16.
